[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000110 3
1 111101100 6
2 001000010 2
3 101110011 6
4 110110101 6
5 011110000 4
6 010110010 4
7 111110000 5

01 10 001000010 2 match 2
12 21 101000010 3
23 32 110110110 6

45 54 110101110 6
56 65 100110001 4
67 76 011000110 4
70 07 101000101 4
